scripts.dev: concurrently -n app,p1,p2,mcp -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:app" "pnpm dev:strategy" "pnpm dev:backtester" "pnpm dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:strategy: cd external/open-trading-api/strategy_builder && uv run uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload --reload-dir backend --reload-dir core
scripts.dev:backtester: cd external/open-trading-api/backtester && uv run uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload --reload-dir backend --reload-dir kis_backtest --reload-dir kis_mcp
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -n p1,p2,mcp -c green,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:strategy" "pnpm dev:backtester" "pnpm dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n app,p1,p2,mcp -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:app" "cd external/open-trading-api/strategy_builder && bash start.sh" "cd external/open-trading-api/backtester && bash start.sh" "pnpm dev:mcp"
scripts.stop: lsof -ti :3333,:8000,:8002,:3846 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo 'All servers stopped'
